name: Banners Co., Ltd.
summary: Banners Co., Ltd. engages in the real estate, and musical instruments and automobile sales businesses in Japan. The company creates and rents tenants and stores; and sells Honda cars and related non-life insurance products. It also imports and sells oboe and bassoon through a specialty store of double reed musical instruments; and provides maintenance and after-sales services for musical instruments customers. Banners Co., Ltd. was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Kumagaya, Japan.
